description: Create an Apache Ant build configuration for the 'commons-cli' project in Eclipse to generate a JAR file. The project uses Java 17 and contains source files in 'src/main/java'. Create a 'build.xml' file in the project root with targets for 'clean' (deleting the build directory), 'compile' (compiling sources to 'build/classes'), and 'jar' (packaging classes into 'build/commons-cli.jar'). Execute the build to produce the JAR file at 'build/commons-cli.jar'.
